reviews.title: Too noise
reviews.text: I stayed 2 days in this hotel but it was too noise from the traffic noise and barking dog and car alarms.

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.title: Degredation!
reviews.text: I have been staying at the hotel beyond count, but it come to me that the hotel is worse and worse. My first stay in the hotel was in 2019 with my impression of it friendly staff, cleanliness as well as great facility. Sadly, the hotel now seems more welcoming to its corporate guests and the hotel no longer pay much attention to the room's facility such as dirty shower, rusty air-conditioner as well as  fall-out LED in the bathroom. The guy (as a former bellman) in the reception is quite inactive. Hope the hotel will have better training for its staff, especially the receptionists. It seems to me that those working as a bellman for certain period of time can become a receptionist without much knowledge of how to perform the position in terms of interacting with guests. This can be my last time in the hotel. Hope it can be improved in terms of room facilities and personel.

reviews.title: An OK place to stay
reviews.text:
Overall this is an OK place to stay.  

The room was a decent size, bright and clean, though the balcony was not much use, (except for drying clothes)   We has a 'deluxe city view' room on the fifth floor facing the main road (despite requesting a "quite" room.  The traffic noise at night wasn't too bad, thanks to some soundproofing! - but, and it's not the hotels fault, there was a dog - which barked all night! and could be heard! 

The breakfast was OK, with several  choices, but if you were late ( we ate around 8:15-8:30, many of the dishes were just warm or were finished and not  replaced.  There was a very limited choice if breakfast pastries - 1!

The security staff at the parking area were very friendly and helpful- with suggestions of where to go etc. 

Overall an OK place to stay.

reviews.title: Nice hotel, some issues
reviews.text: This was our second stay at Phu Cuong Ca Mau and we enjoyed our stay. I have a major concern regarding the safety of the pool. During our first swim, we realized the pool has an uncovered filtration suction area at the bottom. We told a pool staff member, and he said they knew about it and that they would need to get a part from Saigon to cover it. The suction was pretty strong, and my husband had to use force to remove his foot from it. The next time we swam, I told my kids to only swim on the other side of the pool. It was then that we realized there were at least 2 other areas with the same issue. I am surprised the pool is remaining open with such issues. If the hotel is unaware of the dangers of having open suction in a pool, I encourage a simple google search to find your answers.

reviews.title: A good stay in Cà Mau
reviews.text:
From the Cà Mau airport , I took a taxi have the hotel name too and it is cost about 30 k of vnd .
The hotel right at the heart of the Cà Mau and around have many local restaurants and food stalls but the famous local delicacy is the mud scraps . The hotel room have good size , bed is hard but I slept well no problem ,bathroom clean and modern with a large rain shower head and tornedo toillet suite 
The buffet breakfast have good spread with a nice soup of the day . The strong and high potential of this hotel is the young team of staffs , they are willing to make your holidays as a good happy memories in Cà Mau .

reviews.title: Standard 4 stars
reviews.text: The bedroom is OK. The pool is OK. The staff from the reception, restaurant, and breakfast area are all very lovely and polite. The person in charge of the pool was just not very enthusiastic because we needed to light candles for a birthday cake. The honest answer was that they don’t smoke instead of going to get a lighter for us. Our group of 16 people will continue to book at Phu Cuong next year.

reviews.title: 5 star service
reviews.text: It is difficult to fault the excellent service in this Hotel. The rooms are good sized with all the usual amenities. The decor is definitely, renaissance with a touch of Vietnam.

reviews.title: Khách sạn tốt
reviews.text: Khách sạn ở vị trí tốt, nhân viên niềm nở dễ thương. Phòng có hơi cũ nhưng được giữ sạch sẽ. Buffet ổn, đủ đa dạng. Dưới sảnh hay có các bạn trẻ vào chụp hình với mình thì cũng không vấn đề gì nhưng với một số khách sẽ thấy hơi nhốn nháo.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel
reviews.text:
Excellent hotel situated in the heart of the city. The facilities and room were excellent. What a good nights sleep we had in a comfortable bed. The breakfast was good and well presented.
One minor problem was in the inability of the junior receptionist to speak directly to me in English, though I was the one to make the booking. All questions were aimed at my Vietnamese friend. The supervising receptionist only intervened and spoke English when she could see I was rather agitated by the situation.
This apart I enjoyed my stay and would certainly recommend the hotel.

reviews.title: Probably best place in ca mau
reviews.text:
It’s the best hotel you can get in Ca Mau. The venue is amazing in term of design and architecture. 

Bed is comfortable, room cleaned and great view ☺️

We got a miscommunication as they charge noodles and big bottles of water in the room. We have not been noticed and had to pay extra but we notified that to them. 

In the cafe place, they don’t really anticipate so we had to come to them to ask to be served. 

With the lack of competition around that’s the place I suggest to go for business trip, familly, tourists that can afford a minimum.

reviews.title: Reasonable choice
reviews.text: If you have a trip to Ca Mau, Phu Cuong Hotel is a reasonable choice, with a clean and beautiful swimming pool, comfortable and clean amenities, decent food, and reasonable room rates.

reviews.title: Phu Cuong Hotel Ca Mau
reviews.text: This is a very nice hotel, friendly staff, very clean, very nice breakfast, although it rated as 4 star but better than the 5 star (not Sheraton)we stayed in Can Tho.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, breakfast is limited but delicious, it is close to the center making it convenient to go anywhere, all the staff are friendly and courteous, and every time I return to Ca Mau, I want to stay here.

reviews.title: A very good hotel in Ca Mau centre
reviews.text: A splendidly decorated hotel in central Ca Mau with a nod towards ornate Italian and French decor; very pleasantly appointed rooms and a rooftop pool. We enjoyed our stay here and whilst the hotel coffee shop serves good Vietnamese food, we recommend the superb Crab restaurant behind Vincom Centre for dinner.

reviews.title: clean western style hotel
reviews.text: Stay here two times already. The hotel is very nice centrally located, and they even have their own taxi service system.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel for in Ca Mau
reviews.text: Very good option. Staff are quite friendly. Nothing to complain about my room. Had everything I needed. The bathroom is pretty nice and overall clean. Hotel is in a good location. There is streetfood on the same street at night. I relocated for the second night to another hotel as it was already paid, wish I stayed longer. But surely will stay at Phu Cuong next time going to Ca Mau for business

reviews.text: The hotel is situated in the heart of town, and the staff are incredibly friendly and helpful. I strongly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Ca Mau.

reviews.title: Good hotel for staying in Ca Mau city
reviews.text: We had a chance to stay a night at Phu Cuong hotel. Overrall the hotel is good, it is one of the big hotel in the city so the room are almost full. When we arrive a bit early, we cant check in. The staff help us for a motorbike renting but that service was not good, we were a bit disappointed. If you can find another agency, it’s much better. The food at the hotel is very good, room is clean but we can hear the noise outside.

reviews.title: Luxurious option when in Ca Mau
reviews.text:
Stayed in Ca Mau many times for business purposes and have stayed in different hotels every visit. But I can always rely on Phu Cuong, when I want to go for a higher price range. 

The sheets, pillows, cover all clean. Bathroom is clean. Hot water. Aircon cold. The breakfast buffet was good as well.

reviews.title: Visiting Mui Land
reviews.text: I am very satisfied with my stay at Phu Cuong Hotel in Ca Mau. The hotel is located in the center, making it convenient to visit attractions. The staff is friendly, the rooms are clean, and the breakfast buffet offers a variety of dishes. If I have the chance to come back to Ca Mau, I will support Phu Cuong Hotel.

reviews.title: Very Nice Hotel
reviews.text: Hotel is located in Ca Mau center so it is very convinient. We stayed in suite 902, the room is very nice. However, hotel should look into fixing the hot water for this room though. Water was cold for the entire 3 days that we stayed there. My friend stayed in a different room and the hot water was ok so the hot water only seems to not working in room room 902.

reviews.title: Key door room
reviews.text: The receptionist give us only 1 key card. We must ask them add more one.

reviews.title: No 1 Hotel in Ca Mau
reviews.text: Since opening in 2020 it has maintained it's position as the hotel of choice in Ca Mau. The hotel staff are  friendly and attentive.  The rooms are a good size and provide a comfortable stay. Breakfast buffet has a reasonable choice - the best option is pho / noodle soup.  The gym (3rd floor) and pool (10th floor) are good. The location closed to Coop Mart is good.

reviews.title: A complete trip with the choice of Phu Cuong Hotel.
reviews.text: Thanks to Phú Cường Hotel, our family had a very good experience in Cà Mau. The staff is very lovely and enthusiastically introduced many delicious restaurants with good quality and reasonable prices. The breakfast buffet is simple, not too many options, but each dish is well-prepared and seasoned very well, tasty and easy to eat. Therefore, our family booked an extra night here to fully experience the city of Cà Mau.

reviews.title: Price difference when booking locally.
reviews.text: A very nice and spacious hotel. They had exceptional staff and the buffet breakfast was convenient. However, the price variation from Agoda versus when booking in person with local ID was frustrating.

reviews.title: Great holiday
reviews.text:
We had a great stay at this hotel. The location was perfect and the staff were exceptional & friendly. Facilities were top-notch, with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The cleanliness of the property was outstanding. About the bathroom, hot water was stable but the size of bathroom was a little small. However, considering the value for money, we were still satisfied with our stay.
Recommended!

reviews.title: Good upper market hotel with great breakfast
reviews.text:
Great value for money! 
Clean spacious bedrooms and bathrooms, good variety of delicious breakfast, friendly polite staffs, good location.
Well equipped gym: 2x commercial treadmills, gym-quality weigh machines, good weigh set. The only downside is you can't turn on the air-conditioner.

reviews.title: Spacious, comfortable and accommodating
reviews.text: I booked the executive suite for my parents for their weekend getaway and they had tons of compliments for this hotel. The suite has its own living space, separated bedroom, with a smart TV in each room, huge bathroom. To my surprise, the gym is pretty decked out. The rooftop pool is the cherry on the cake, providing a great view. Breakfast buffet was decent. Oh and they offered my parents a plate of fresh fruits delivered to their room, on the house. Very neat. Overall, I’d recommend this hotel if you’re traveling to Ca Mau 👍🏻

reviews.title: STRONGLY RECOMMEND THIS HOTEL IN CA MAU
reviews.text: I first stayed at Phu Cuong Hotel at the beginning of 2023, which was also my first time in Ca Mau. Usually, when I travel to different provinces, I like to experience various hotels, but with Phu Cuong Hotel, from my first visit to now in May 2024, I have been to Ca Mau 7 times, and all 7 times (each stay at least 3 nights) I only want to stay at Phu Cuong. From the experience of the room, the staff, the breakfast buffet, and the hotel amenities, everything has been absolutely wonderful. I hope the hotel continues to grow and prosper even more. 🫶🏻

reviews.text: I would recommend Phu Cuong to anyone who wants to visit Ca Mau. This is a new hotel with modern facilities and it is situated in the heart of Ca May. All the eating places and shopping centers are nearby

reviews.title: Clean and New
reviews.text:
The hotel is beautiful and we'll decorated. The rooms are a nice size with all amenities. The beds and covers are very comfortable. The Breakfast buffet had a large selection.
There is an infinity pool on the roof but no pool towel service. They only provide one pool towel in each room.

reviews.title: Value for money

reviews.title: A pleasant surprise
reviews.text: Only stayed for 1 night with 4 rooms booked via Agoda. Had lunch, dinner & breakfast at the hotel, everything was absolutely perfect.  In such an unknown place in Vietnam, Phu Cuong Hotel really gave us a huge and very pleasant surprise.  Would stay there again whenever we visit Ca Mau.

reviews.text: Schampo und Seife für Dusche haben starken Geruch, sonst ist alles in Ordnung

reviews.title: Recensione 5 stelle!
reviews.text:
Ho soggiornato qui e sono rimasto davvero colpito. La struttura è lussuosa, moderna e pulita, le camere sono spaziose e confortevoli e la vista dalla piscina panoramica è mozzafiato.
Un punto di forza dell'albergo è la reception: il personale è gentile, disponibile e sempre pronto ad aiutare gli ospiti.                                  In particolare, la receptionist Thll è stata davvero fantastica: mi ha accolto con un sorriso caloroso, mi ha fornito tutte le informazioni necessarie ed  è stata bravissima perché, nonostante la tarda ora, è riuscita a trovarmi un posto per l'escursione al parco nazionale del giorno successivo.
Altri aspetti positivi dell'albergo: colazione abbondante e varia, posizione centrale vicino a tutti i principali luoghi d'interesse, Wi-Fi gratuito e la camera era dotata di un balcone con vista sulla città.
Lo consiglio vivamente a tutti coloro che cercano un soggiorno confortevole e rilassante.

reviews.title: 그럭저럭 호텔
reviews.text:
4성급으로는 평범한 정도.
직원 친절. 영어 스피치가 빨라 알아듣기 힘듬.
수영장 관리가 부실.  냄새가 심하고  타일 깨진데가 거슬릴 정도.
호텔 세탁비 엄청 비쌈.
현지인이 대부분이라 조식뷔폐도  헌지인 위주.  종류는  많은데 먹을건  그럭저럭.  고기종류는 매우  부드럽게 요리해 만족함

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
- Lễ tân kg vui vẽ, nhẹ nhàng, khô khan cứng nhắc, cục mịch.
- Bếp khu buffet không vui vẽ, lịch thiệp, thiếu thiện cảm.
- Tỉ lệ wc quá nhỏ so với phòng, cảm giác chật chội ngột ngạt. Vòi hoa sen bố trí cấn không đóng cửa được.
- Không lễ tân, bảo vệ bãi xe 24/24...

reviews.title: Không quay lại

reviews.title: KS có các quy định không hợp lý
reviews.text:
Giờ buffet sáng từ 6h tới 8.30 sáng rất không phù hợp với lịch trình sinh hoạt của khách du lịch, thăm thú Cà Mau và nghỉ dưỡng. Các nơi khác ít nhất kéo dài thời gian buffet sáng tới 9.30 hoặc 10h sáng. 

Giường có rệp và chúng tôi bị cắn trong đêm đầu tiên. Nệm bị lún và gối không thoải mái, dẫn đến việc ngủ không thẳng giấc và sáng bị đau lưng đau cổ. 

Các dịch vụ khác chúng tôi không sử dụng nên không có ý kiến.

reviews.title: Tính thêm tiền
reviews.text:
Thông thường nếu có phòng sẳn thì các Ks khác sẽ cho khách ở xa đến nhận phòng sớm hơn. Đằng này bắt khách phải trả thêm 50% khi nhận phòng lúc 12g. 
Thêm 500 ngàn không có là bao, nhưng cảm thấy không vui. Khác với các Ks Khác.
